def solve(grid, k)
  m = grid.size
  n = grid[0].size
  visited = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, false) }
  count = 0

  for i in 0...m
    for j in 0...n
      if grid[i][j] > 0 && !visited[i][j]
        queue = [[i, j]]
        visited[i][j] = true
        sum = grid[i][j]
        while !queue.empty?
          x, y = queue.shift
          [[-1, 0], [1, 0], [0, -1], [0, 1]].each do |dx, dy|
            nx = x + dx
            ny = y + dy
            if nx >= 0 && nx < m && ny >= 0 && ny < n && !visited[nx][ny] && grid[nx][ny] > 0
              visited[nx][ny] = true
              sum += grid[nx][ny]
              queue << [nx, ny]
            end
          end
        end
        count += 1 if sum % k == 0
      end
    end
  end
  count
end

def solve(grid, k)

   m = grid.size

   n = grid[0].size unless m == 0

   visited = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, false) }

   count = 0

   for i in 0...m

      for j in 0...n

         if grid[i][j] > 0 && !visited[i][j]

            # BFS

            queue = [[i, j]]

            visited[i][j] = true

            sum = grid[i][j]

            while !queue.empty?

               x, y = queue.shift

               # check all four directions

               [ [-1,0], [1,0], [0,-1], [0,1] ].each do |dx, dy|

                  nx = x + dx

                  ny = y + dy

                  if nx >= 0 && nx < m && ny >= 0 && ny < n && !visited[nx][ny] && grid[nx][ny] > 0

                     visited[nx][ny] = true

                     sum += grid[nx][ny]

                     queue << [nx, ny]

                  end

               end

            end

            if sum % k == 0

               count += 1

            end

         end

      end

   end

   count

end

def solve(grid, k)
  m = grid.size
  n = grid[0].size
  visited = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, false) }
  count = 0

  for i in 0...m
    for j in 0...n
      if grid[i][j] > 0 && !visited[i][j]
        queue = [[i, j]]
        visited[i][j] = true
        sum = grid[i][j]
        while !queue.empty?
          x, y = queue.shift
          [[-1, 0], [1, 0], [0, -1], [0, 1]].each do |dx, dy|
            nx = x + dx
            ny = y + dy
            if nx >= 0 && nx < m && ny >= 0 && ny < n && !visited[nx][ny] && grid[nx][ny] > 0
              visited[nx][ny] = true
              sum += grid[nx][ny]
              queue << [nx, ny]
            end
          end
        end
        count += 1 if sum % k == 0
      end
    end
  end
  count
end
